description: VERIFIED LIVE: 澎湃新闻 (ThePaper) via its public JSON API (no login, no key) — structured + paginated, preferred over DOM scraping. api.thepaper.cn returns article lists with contId/title/pubTime. Tested live by Claude Code: nodeCont/getByNodeId returned 10 articles (hasNext cursor) and the sidebar endpoint 200. Article page = https://www.thepaper.cn/newsDetail_forward_<contId>.

tools.name: thepaper_channel
tools.description: Articles in a 澎湃 channel (node). POST body { nodeId: number, pageSize?: number (default 20), startTime?: number (0 for first page; pass the response's startTime to page further) }. Returns data.list[] with contId, name (title), pubTime, pic. Open an article at https://www.thepaper.cn/newsDetail_forward_<contId>. Common nodeId: 25462 (时事). VERIFIED.

tools.name: thepaper_sidebar
tools.description: 澎湃 homepage right-sidebar feed (hot/recommended). No body needed. Returns data with propaganda/recommended lists. VERIFIED.
